panels.description: Wide shot: A dark, ominous Victorian house at dusk. A nervous worker gestures towards the shadows of the doorway, his face pale with dread, speaking to the narrator.

bubbles.text: Lor', I wouldn't take less nor a quid a moment to stay there arter dark.

panels.description: Medium shot: I am looking at a series of documents and maps laid out on a mahogany table. I am tracing a finger over a location labeled 'Carfax'. The room is lit by a single desk lamp.

bubbles.text: Fifty boxes, deposited in the old chapel. I must find the carter who moved them.

panels.description: Medium close-up: Mina and I sitting together, stacks of organized papers piled between us. Mina looks relieved, a soft light highlighting her hopeful expression.

bubbles.text: Finally, all in order. The haunting fear is lifting.

panels.description: Medium shot: Mina stands in the parlor greeting Lord Godalming and Mr. Morris. Their faces are solemn, reflecting grief. The room is formal, with heavy curtains.

bubbles.text: Gentlemen, please. I have everything here. It is time you knew what happened to Lucy.
